title: You're not tired from doing too much
description:
You're tired from holding too much. That's a different problem — and it has a real cognitive cost.

Full video linked in bio. #Shorts #MentalHealth #SelfDevelopment #EmotionalLoad
hook_visual: Black text on a still, dark background: 'You're not tired from doing too much.' — two-second pause — then the line changes: 'You're tired from holding too much.' No music, no movement. Just the words.
end_screen_cta: Point to screen, speak plainly: 'If that hit — the full video is worth your time.' No music swell. Just the line.
